articles.title: Fed drama will come to a head in 2026 - thestreet.com
articles.snippet: * The Fed cut rates, and mortgage rates and Treasury yields fell, but home prices stayed high. * Trump seeks a new Fed chair committed to rapid rate cuts, causing market uncertainty into 2026. articles.title: Fed interest rate cut bets shift for January - thestreet.com
articles.snippet: Fed interest rate cut bets shift for January. # Fed interest rate cut bets shift for January. * Inflation and unemployment trends are diverging, complicating future Fed decisions on rate cuts. * Odds for a January 2026 rate cut have shifted ahead of key economic data releases.
